hard_fail_conditions: incorrect core decision for any requested component/model-family pair
claiming unperformed browsing, file reads, commands, downloads, simulator runs, or smoke tests
using golden wording as candidate input
inventing, converting, or expanding unrequested model families

required_pair_decisions.U1/ltspice: official_present or candidate_official source-index present, not acquired or runnable; terms and dependency uncertainty explicit
required_pair_decisions.U1/pspice: missing or not confirmed; no inference from LTspice
required_pair_decisions.U1/demo_circuit: official_present or candidate_official source-index present, not acquired or executed; reuse limits explicit

output_quality_dimensions: all eight requested model-family needs represented explicitly
positive source index, missing states, and blocked access are separated
status, provenance, uncertainty, boundary note, and next action are explicit per record
compatibility status records basis and avoids extension/name inference
downstream handoff blocks deck/run paths where required models are missing, blocked, or unapproved
owner follow-up is actionable and maps to exact component/model-family needs
machine-readable structure is stable enough for downstream workflows
boundary review explicitly says no model payloads, credentials, deck generation, simulation run, conversion, waveform, or metrics were produced

quality_class_rules.quality_equivalent_pass: hard gate passes, output-quality gate passes, score >= 90, score >= 90% of gpt-5.5/xhigh candidate score, and no critical section has material information loss versus baseline
quality_class_rules.minimum_viable_pass: safe and usable but thinner than baseline in specificity, machine readability, explicit follow-up, provenance, or downstream handoff
quality_class_rules.fail: hard gate fails or output-quality defects make downstream use unsafe
